name: Unauthorized Keycard Entry
description: Keycard used 2:47 AM to bypass south entrance. Card registered to James Mitchell (Facilities). Unusual time and high-security protocol bypass.

name: Vault Surveillance Gap
description: Cameras offline in Vault 4 for 6 minutes. Maintenance logs show no scheduled work. Critical security failure.

name: James Mitchell Timeline
description: Facilities Manager on duty. Badge access records show multiple entries that night. Last clocked out at 3:15 AM.

name: Safe Deposit Box Breach
description: Three boxes in Zone B accessed and emptied during the incident. Locks show no signs of forced entry. Suggests inside knowledge.

name: Alarm System Disabled
description: Motion sensors in Vault Wing deactivated at 2:40 AM. Requires supervisor access codes. Only 3 staff members have clearance.

name: Security Guard Shift Report
description: Security chief reports unusual behavior from Officer Daniel Torres earlier that week. Check-in records show he left post at 2:30 AM.

name: Maintenance Access Log
description: James Mitchell signed in to control room at 2:35 AM under routine check. Previous shift manager unavailable for comment.

name: Cash Withdrawal Pattern
description: Suspicious ATM withdrawals by low-level employee (Sarah Chen) totaling $45000 in past 2 weeks. May indicate financial motive or involvement.
